description: Houstonian.com is the website for The Houstonian Hotel, Club & Spa in Houston, Texas. It provides hotel, club, spa, and reservation information, and publishes an AI agent card for its reservations assistant.
summary: houstonian.com exposes a public agent card at `/.well-known/agent-card.json`; no HTTP API, GraphQL API, CLI, or authenticated developer credential surface was found on the domain.
